title: limodorum latifolium
intro: Limodorum latifolium, also known as the greater butterfly orchid or greater butterfly flower, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Limodorum latifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
